name: @chbrain/khai-engine-reversal
description: khai reversal engine — the inversion of a situation's direction
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: The inversion of a situation's direction.

card.wire: Link the phase the persona is in (approach, turn, or aftermath) under Projection.
card.issue: The direction the persona held as settled, and what has inverted or is inverting it.
card.require: An established trajectory (a direction the situation was going) that a specific event or revelation is capable of inverting.
card.enforce: Reversal is not surprise. The turn must invert a direction; news that does not change the direction is not a reversal. Do not use reversal to mean unexpected.
card.setup: Name the direction the situation held before the turn, the event or revelation that pivoted it, and the new direction the persona now faces.
